title: Deprecated $this->smarty module property
description: Code accesses $this->smarty directly. This magic property was deprecated in CMSMS 2.1.
explanation: The $this->smarty magic property on module objects was deprecated in CMSMS 2.1. Use cmsms()->GetSmarty() or the $smarty variable provided in action scope.
fix: Replace $this->smarty with cmsms()->GetSmarty() or use the $smarty variable already available in action files.
